creator: serhii.laskavyi@gmail.com
text:
David O'Brien, libdvdcss when compiled by FreeBSD 7 default gcc 4.2.1
20070719 with -Wall, warns about "pointer targets in passing argument
1 of 'sprintf' differ in signedness" only (8 similar warnings).

Stanislav Sedov, I use default CFLAGS. Just recompiled libdvdcss, it
now uses "-fno-strict-aliasing" gcc option and the problem with DVD
decryption disappeared.
